sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO timestamps VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:00:00'), (2, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:15:00');
UPDATE timestamps SET event_time = time_bucket(INTERVAL '30 minutes', event_time) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 hour', event_time, INTERVAL '30 minutes') AS bucketed_time FROM timestamps;
DELETE FROM timestamps WHERE time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 hour', event_time) = TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:00:00';
